context: Tests whether the agent follows Phoenix/ExUnit testing conventions: using fixtures for shared test data, DataCase/ConnCase setup modules, LiveView structural assertions, authorization coverage, and safe timestamp handling.

checklist.name: Fixture file exists
checklist.description: A fixture module is created under test/support/fixtures/ (e.g., blog_fixtures.ex) with at least one function for creating blog test data

checklist.name: No inline data duplication
checklist.description: Test data (posts, users) is NOT built inline with the same attribute map repeated in two or more separate test cases — it is referenced via the fixture module instead

checklist.name: Context tests use DataCase
checklist.description: The Blog context test module uses DataCase (not ConnCase or no case at all) in its `use` or `ExUnit.Case` call

checklist.name: LiveView tests use ConnCase
checklist.description: The PostLive.Index test module uses ConnCase in its `use` or `ExUnit.Case` call

checklist.name: has_element?/2 used in LiveView tests
checklist.description: At least one LiveView structural assertion uses has_element?/2 (e.g., assert has_element?(view, "#post-123")) rather than html =~ "some text" for structure checks

checklist.name: No html =~ for structure checks
checklist.description: Does NOT use html =~ "..." as an assertion for checking the presence of HTML elements or structure (string contains checks on rendered HTML); plain text content checks with =~ are acceptable but structural/element checks must use has_element?/2

checklist.name: Unauthorized case tested
checklist.description: At least one test case covers an unauthenticated or unauthorized user attempting to access the LiveView index page or a protected action (e.g., delete), asserting a redirect or error response

checklist.name: No hardcoded dates
checklist.description: No hardcoded date/datetime literals (e.g., ~U[2024-01-01 00:00:00Z] or "2024-01-01") are used in timestamp assertions — relative checks like DateTime.diff(...) or DateTime.utc_now() comparisons are used instead

checklist.name: LiveView async: false
checklist.description: The LiveView test module does NOT use async: true — it either omits the async option or sets async: false

checklist.name: Context async: true
checklist.description: The Blog context test module uses async: true (acceptable for DB-sandbox context tests that don't share rows or use Application.put_env)

checklist.name: Fixture module function names
checklist.description: The fixture module in test/support/fixtures/ defines at least one public function (e.g., post_fixture/1 or blog_fixture/1) rather than bare module attributes or inline maps
